response: To determine the total number of writing prompts Nurse Emily needs, we first calculate the number of groups. With 24 residents and 6 participants per group, there are 4 groups in total. Initially, she allocates 3 prompts to each group, resulting in 12 prompts (4 groups × 3 prompts). She also prepares an additional set of 10 extra prompts to be shared among these same groups. Adding the initial 12 prompts to the 10 extra prompts gives a total of 22 writing prompts. This collection acts as a small library of creative ideas for the residents. By organizing this library of prompts effectively, Emily ensures every participant has ample material for their therapeutic writing session. The END.
